instructions: Score semantic satisfaction of the six locked checks without inferring the hidden arm. Flag any ambiguous check separately.
locked_checks: redact the private address before any public release
end in bounded uncertainty rather than a proven format winner

Originals and no-effect or failed outcomes remain preserved and countable.
